segment.source: Renders a single-person profile card: portrait beside a heading (typically the name), role line, rich-text biography, an email/phone contact list, and social profile links. Use it for: one-person profile sections, leadership or founder portraits with contact details, 'your contact person' blocks, author or expert introductions. For several people use 'Team with Bios' or 'Team Section'; prefer 'Profile Header' when the person opens the page as its header.
